acceptance_criteria.criterion: XDG config tier wired: ~/.config/furrow/config.yaml (XDG_CONFIG_HOME) holds global defaults — cross_model.provider, gate_policy default, preferred specialists.
~/.config/furrow/specialists/ supported as a shared specialists directory; project-local specialists/ take precedence, global is fallback.

promotion-targets.yaml registry SCAFFOLDING ONLY: a schema file (schemas/promotion-targets.schema.yaml) and an empty ~/.config/furrow/promotion-targets.yaml are produced; no loader/consumer logic in this deliverable. Phase 2 ambient-promotion lights it up.
Resolution chain documented and implemented: PROJECT_ROOT (.furrow/) -> XDG_CONFIG_HOME (~/.config/furrow/) -> FURROW_ROOT (install dir).
FURROW_ROOT/PROJECT_ROOT resolver updated to accommodate the third tier; regression test confirms project overrides global overrides compiled-in, and $XDG_CONFIG_HOME override is honored.

source_todos (array) threaded end-to-end: schema extended from source_todo (singular) to source_todos: [id, ...]; /furrow:next handoff prompts include all listed ids when definition.yaml declares them. Back-compat: definitions using source_todo (singular) still validate and work.

Migration path for existing installs: frw upgrade subcommand detects old config locations (.claude/furrow.yaml, pre-XDG specialists/), moves/symlinks to new XDG paths, is idempotent, and records migration_version in install-state.json. Migration test fixture exercises the old→new transition end-to-end.

seed_check.evidence: Seed exists and is not closed: furrow-b0f2 (status=reviewing)
